calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2015 Off Calendar

Defendants Notice Of Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint Pursuant To C.C.P. § 425.16
Off Calendar Mar-17-2015 Off Calendar

Defendants Notice Of Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint Pursuant To C.C.P. § 425.16
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Continued To Apr-01-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

Defendant Wons Notice Of Demurrer To Plaintiff Swans Complaint For Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Jan-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Scott Freedman, Esq. of Zacks & Freedman (415-956-8100) for Plaintiff/opposing party Jane Swan.
Jacqueline Ravenscroft, Esq. of Tobener Law Center(415-504-2165) for Defendant/moving party Jennie Won.
Brianna Rudd, Court reporter,(209-747-1306), CSR #13668.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JENNIE WON's Demurrer To Plaintiff Swans Complaint For Declaratory Relief is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint for declaratory relief is sufficiently alleged. Won is a proper party. The Court tells Defendant to file an answer. Order is signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter, Brianna Rudd, (209-747-1306), CSR #13668, Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Scott Freedman, Esq. of Zacks & Freedman (415-956-8100) for Plaintiff/opposing party Jane Swan.
Jacqueline Ravenscroft, Esq. of Tobener Law Center(415-504-2165) for Defendant/moving party John Marek.
Brianna Rudd, Court reporter,(209-747-1306) CSR #13668

Defendant's counsel does not contest the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JOHN MAREK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint for declaratory relief is sufficiently alleged. Order is signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter, Brianna Rudd, (209-747-1306) CSR #13668, Reported. (D501)
